description: Machine-readable incident taxonomy for OpenClaw operational triage.

classes.label: Provider Timeout
classes.recommendedAction: Retry with backoff, then fallback to alternate provider/model.

classes.label: Provider Rate Limited
classes.recommendedAction: Apply cooldown/backoff and shift traffic if sustained.

classes.label: Provider Quota Exceeded
classes.userImpact: Provider becomes unusable until quota is restored
classes.recommendedAction: Route to alternate provider and notify operator.

classes.label: Provider Auth Invalid
classes.userImpact: Provider unavailable due to credential failure
classes.recommendedAction: Escalate immediately and disable broken route.

classes.label: Provider Server Error
classes.recommendedAction: Retry a limited number of times, then fallback.

classes.label: Provider Unavailable
classes.recommendedAction: Mark provider degraded and shift traffic away.

classes.label: Invalid Response Shape
classes.userImpact: Tooling or downstream parsing may break
classes.recommendedAction: Retry with stricter formatting or alternate model.

classes.label: Empty Response
classes.recommendedAction: Retry once, then fallback.

classes.label: Invalid Tool Call
classes.recommendedAction: Validate arguments, repair if possible, otherwise retry/fallback.

classes.label: Oversize Response
classes.userImpact: Downstream surface may reject or truncate output
classes.recommendedAction: Trim/reformat output before resend.

classes.label: Discord Rejected Payload
classes.userImpact: Message fails to deliver to Discord
classes.recommendedAction: Shorten/rewrite payload and retry.

classes.label: Discord Delivery Failed
classes.userImpact: Message may not reach the user
classes.recommendedAction: Retry send, then log to alternate sink if needed.

classes.label: Raw Error Leak
classes.userImpact: Low-quality or confusing system internals shown to user
classes.recommendedAction: Rewrite user-facing message and capture as quality incident.

classes.label: Gateway Timeout
classes.userImpact: Request stalls or fails before completion
classes.recommendedAction: Investigate context size, hooks, provider latency, and retries.

classes.label: Hook Failed
classes.userImpact: Automation or enrichment behavior may be skipped
classes.recommendedAction: Retry if safe and flag recurrence in operational learning.

classes.label: Cron Failed
classes.userImpact: Scheduled maintenance or extraction may be missed
classes.recommendedAction: Retry if important and alert if repeated.

classes.label: Queue Backlog High
classes.recommendedAction: Inspect queue depth, oldest age, and consumer throughput.

classes.label: Server Resource Pressure
classes.recommendedAction: Inspect CPU, memory, disk, and load; reduce pressure or scale.

classes.label: Workflow Dependency Blocked
classes.recommendedAction: Surface prominently in board and resolve upstream dependency.

classes.label: Stale Active Work
classes.recommendedAction: Surface in Review and Now for re-entry.

classes.label: Reminder Overdue
classes.recommendedAction: Bubble into Now and Review until addressed.
